join_order.probe: num (filtered: uom='USD' AND value IS NOT NULL)
join_order.notes: Use mmap'd sub_adsh_index.bin (cap=262144, SubSlot{adsh_code,sub_row}). Zero build cost (P11). After probe, apply sub_fy[sub_row]==2022 filter (~0.317 selectivity on sub side).

filters.notes: Load num/uom_dict.txt at runtime to find usd_code (C2). Filter before index probe.
NULL encoded as quiet_NaN. Apply before index probe.
Applied after index probe resolves sub_row. Combined effective selectivity ~0.277.

data_structures.main_agg_thread_local: open_addressing_hash_map per thread, key=uint64_t packed(name_code<<32|cik), value=int64_t sum_cents, cap=next_pow2(27000*2)=65536
data_structures.cik_agg_thread_local: open_addressing_hash_map per thread, key=int32_t cik, value=int64_t sum_cents, cap=next_pow2(27000*2)=65536
data_structures.main_agg_global: open_addressing_hash_map (merged), key=uint64_t packed, value=int64_t sum_cents, cap=65536
data_structures.cik_agg_global: open_addressing_hash_map (merged), key=int32_t cik, value=int64_t sum_cents, cap=65536

main.precision_rule: C29 HARD: int64_t cents only — no double/long double/Kahan

having_subquery.notes: Accumulated simultaneously in same scan pass as main agg (P4). No second scan.

aggregation.merge_notes: T*G = 64 * 27000 = 1.7M (100K-2M range). Merge groups of 8 threads in parallel (log8(64)=2 rounds), then final 8→1. Applied to BOTH main_agg and cik_agg maps.

parallelism.barrier: after parallel scan; merge thread-local maps before threshold computation

indexes.purpose: join_lookup — probe with num.adsh_code to resolve sub_row
indexes.probe_pattern: bounded for-loop (C24), break on sentinel or match

single_pass_strategy.description: Scan num once. For each row: (1) filter uom==usd_code && !isnan(value); (2) probe sub_adsh_index → sub_row; (3) filter sub_fy[sub_row]==2022; (4) accumulate into thread-local main_agg[(name_code,cik)] and thread-local cik_agg[cik] in same iteration.

having_evaluation.step1: After merge: compute total_cik_sum_cents = SUM of all cik_agg values; n_distinct_ciks = count of cik_agg entries
having_evaluation.step3: Filter main_agg: keep entry if (double)sum_cents > threshold_cents
having_evaluation.precision_note: threshold_cents is AVG of int64_t cents sums, cast to double for comparison only — no precision loss at this scale

columns: s.name (decode name_code via name_dict, double-quoted C31)
total_value (formatted int64_t cents: sum_cents/100 + '.' + abs(sum_cents%100) zero-padded to 2 digits)
output.sort_algorithm: std::partial_sort on result vector (P6, O(n log k))

correctness_checklist: C2: load num/uom_dict.txt at runtime for usd_code
C9: all hash caps = next_pow2(N*2); thread-local sized for FULL 27K groups not 27K/64
C15: main_agg key = packed(name_code, cik) — both GROUP BY columns
C24: sub_adsh_index probe uses bounded for-loop (probe < sub_cap)
C27: sub_cap/sub_mask/sub_ht declared at function scope before any probe loop
C29: accumulate as int64_t cents via llround(v*100.0) — NEVER double/Kahan
C31: double-quote name string in CSV output
C33: stable tiebreaker (name_code ASC, cik ASC) in sort comparator
P4: single scan over num — both main_agg and cik_agg accumulated in one pass
P11: sub_adsh_index is pre-built mmap — no runtime build cost
P20: thread-local aggregation maps mandatory — no shared map
